mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, token_hash, issued_at, expires_at, revoked, revoked_at, replaced_by, device_info, ip, last_used_at, created_at, updated_at FROM refresh_tokens WHERE token_hash = #{tokenHash} LIMIT 1

SELECT id, user_id, token_hash, issued_at, expires_at, revoked, revoked_at, replaced_by, device_info, ip, last_used_at, created_at, updated_at FROM refresh_tokens WHERE token_hash = #{tokenHash} LIMIT 1 FOR UPDATE
SELECT id, user_id, token_hash, issued_at, expires_at, revoked, revoked_at, replaced_by, device_info, ip, last_used_at, created_at, updated_at FROM refresh_tokens WHERE id = #{id} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO refresh_tokens (id, user_id, token_hash, issued_at, expires_at, revoked, revoked_at, replaced_by, device_info, ip, last_used_at, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{id}, #{userId}, #{tokenHash}, #{issuedAt}, #{expiresAt}, #{revoked}, #{revokedAt}, #{replacedBy}, #{deviceInfo}, #{ip}, #{lastUsedAt}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.update: UPDATE refresh_tokens SET user_id = #{userId}, token_hash = #{tokenHash}, issued_at = #{issuedAt}, expires_at = #{expiresAt}, revoked = #{revoked}, revoked_at = #{revokedAt}, replaced_by = #{replacedBy}, device_info = #{deviceInfo}, ip = #{ip}, last_used_at = #{lastUsedAt}, created_at = #{createdAt}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, token_hash, issued_at, expires_at, revoked, revoked_at, replaced_by, device_info, ip, last_used_at, created_at, updated_at FROM refresh_tokens WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND revoked = FALSE ORDER BY issued_at DESC LIMIT 1
